verses.text: Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tu-in Faro' tungah ka bawl ding na mu ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in utlopipi-in amaute sawlkhia ding hi. Amah in utlopipi-in ama leitang panin amaute hawlkhia taktak ding hi,” a ci hi.
Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob-te' tungah Vanglian Pasian-in ka kilang a, ahih hangin Topa ahi keima min tawh amaute' tungah kei ka kitheisak kei hi
Amaute tawlkhat sung a ten'na leitang ahi Kanaan gam amaute' tungah piak dingin amaute tawh ka thuciamna zong ka kipsak hi
Tua thamloin Egypt mite in salin a neih Israel mite' thumna ka zazo a, ka thuciamna ka phawkzo hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite' tungah, ‘Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Egypt mite' na na sepna uh panin note kong paikhiatpih ding hi. Amau' sal hihna panin note kong khahkhia ding a, a thahat ka khut zanin thukhenna nasep lian tawh note kong honkhia ding hi
Keima mi dingin note kong la ding a, kei pen note' Pasian ka hi ding hi. Egypt mite' sila hihna panin note a hong paikhiatpihpa, Topa na Pasian uh ka hihna note in na thei ding uh hi
Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob-te' tunga ka ciam leitangah note kong paipih ding hi. Tua leitang na neih dingun note' tungah kong pia ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Moses in tua bangmahin Israel mite tungah a gen hi. Ahih hangin amau' lungsim kitapna leh a salsuahna sung uhah a gimna uh hangin amaute in Moses' thu ngailo uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah
“Pai-in va tum in la, ama leitang panin Israel mite a paikhiat sakna ding Egypt kumpipa Faro' kiangah va gen in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “En in, Israel mite nangawn in ka thu hong ngailo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in thugen siamlo keima thu, Faro in hong ngai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Topa in Moses leh Aaron tungah thu gen a, Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiatpih dingin note ka hong sawlna thu, Israel mite leh Egypt kumpipa Faro' tungah va gen un, ci-in a hanthawn hi.
Hihte pen amau' beh lutangte ahi hi: Israel' ta a suak masa Reuben' tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron, leh Karmi ahi hi. Hihte pen Reuben-te beh ahi hi
Simeon' tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakhin, Zohar, leh Kanaan numei' tapa Shaul ahi hi. Hihte pen Simeon-te beh ahi hi
Hihte pen amau' khang tawh kizui-in Levi' tapate' min ahi hi: Gershon, Kohath, leh Merari hi a, Levi kum za leh kum sawmthumlesagih nungta hi
Gershon' tapate: Amau' innkuan tawh kizui-in Libni leh Shimei ahi hi
Kohath' tapate: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, leh Uzziel hi a, Kohath kum za leh kum sawmthumlethum nungta hi
Merari' tapate: Mahli leh Mushi ahi hi. Hihte pen amau' khang tawh kizui-in Levi-te beh ahi hi
Amram in ama pa' sanggamnu Jokhebed zi-in la a, tuanu in amah tawh Aaron leh Moses nei hi. Amram kum za leh kum sawmthumlesagih nungta hi
Izhar' tapate: Korah, Nefeg, leh Zikri ahi hi
Uzziel' tapate: Mishael, Elzafan, leh Sithri ahi hi
Aaron in Amminadab' tanu, Nahshon' sanggamnu Elisheba zi-in la hi. Tuanu in amah tawh Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, leh Ithamar nei hi
Korah' tapate: Assir, Elkanah, leh Abiasaf hi a, hihte pen Korah-te beh ahi hi
Aaron' tapa Eleazer in Putiel' tanute khat zi-in la hi. Tuanu in amah tawh Finehas nei hi. Hihte pen a innkuan kuanin Levi mite' beh lutangte ahi hi
“Egypt gam panin Israel mite a honpi-in paikhiatpih in,” Topa in a cihna mite pen hih Aaron leh Moses ahi uh hi
Egypt gam panin Israel mite paikhiatpihna ding thu Egypt kumpipa Faro' tunga thu a gente pen hih Moses leh Aaron ahi uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Moses leh Aaron tungah Topa' Genna

verses.text: Egypt gamah Moses kiangah Topa in thu a gen ni-in
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Na tunga kong gen khempeuh Egypt kumpipa Faro' tungah gen in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “En in, kei pen thugen a siamlo mi ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in Faro in ka thu hong ngai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
